item.title: Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: diana2019
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool is the perfect solution if users want to migrate to Office 365 from any IMAP platform. This software allows the processing of numerous mailboxes in a single go without size restriction. It offers a filter option, which users can use to select particular items to migrate into MS Office 365. Also, one can remove unwanted items using its filter option before beginning the migration task. Users can apply a filter based on the date or folder-wise criteria. This software retains the folder hierarchy and integrity of the original data after migrating to the Office 365 account.
This IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool offers a scheduler option as well, which users can use to schedule the migration job on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis. Moreover, the tool allows users to migrate data from IMAP to Exchange On-Premises. Users can use its incremental export option, which is helpful in resuming the interrupted process and prevents data from duplicating items. It works on the job-based process and allows the creation of numerous jobs concurrently. The speed of the process will remain the same if users run various jobs at a time. To get more info on the tool’s features, try its free demo version.

[read more]
item.description:
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool is the perfect solution if users want to migrate to Office 365 from any IMAP platform. This software allows the processing of numerous mailboxes in a single go without size restriction. It offers a filter option, which users can use to select particular items to migrate into MS Office 365. Also, one can remove unwanted items using its filter option before beginning the migration task. Users can apply a filter based on the date or folder-wise criteria. This software retains the folder hierarchy and integrity of the original data after migrating to the Office 365 account.
This IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool offers a scheduler option as well, which users can use to schedule the migration job on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis. Moreover, the tool allows users to migrate data from IMAP to Exchange On-Premises. Users can use its incremental export option, which is helpful in resuming the interrupted process and prevents data from duplicating items. It works on the job-based process and allows the creation of numerous jobs concurrently. The speed of the process will remain the same if users run various jobs at a time. To get more info on the tool’s features, try its free demo version.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool is the perfect solution if users want to migrate to Office 365 from any IMAP platform. This software allows the processing of numerous mailboxes in a single go without size restriction. It offers a filter option, which users can use to select particular items to migrate into MS Office 365. Also, one can remove unwanted items using its filter option before beginning the migration task. Users can apply a filter based on the date or folder-wise criteria. This software retains the folder hierarchy and integrity of the original data after migrating to the Office 365 account.
This IMAP to Office 365 Migration Tool offers a scheduler option as well, which users can use to schedule the migration job on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis. Moreover, the tool allows users to migrate data from IMAP to Exchange On-Premises. Users can use its incremental export option, which is helpful in resuming the interrupted process and prevents data from duplicating items. It works on the job-based process and allows the creation of numerous jobs concurrently. The speed of the process will remain the same if users run various jobs at a time. To get more info on the tool’s features, try its free demo version.

[read more]

item.title: Free Greeting Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Free Greeting Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Free Greeting Card Software
(Office Apps)
You can visit www.barcodelabelmaker.net to download Free Greeting Card Software to generate bulk of cards for different purpose with option to add photo, graphic, clipart, templates and text messages. Card Designing Program prints most versatile greeting cards using advanced data set generating series techniques in very few mouse clicks. Card Maker Program provides facility to create new card or make the changes according to your need. Card Designing Program saves all generated cards in major file format on computer for further usage.
[read more]

item.title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]

Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]

OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

item.title: Pen Drive Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Using Pen Drive Files Recovery Software to save you from a huge headache – With all of the modern world’s electronic gadgets, there is a necessity to use file recovery tools. These help to save our valuable information that is no longer kept in files, written long hand. As usual many recovery solutions are available in the market but Pen Drive Files Recovery Software provides simplest way to restore your precious data against major electronic incidents just like a magic. Data Doctor USB flash drive data recovery tool fully supports all major capacities of pen drives like 8GB, 16GB, 32GB, 128GB and higher more.

[read more]

item.title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt6Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt6
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]
[read more]

(Qt Components)

- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]

item.title: Qt6 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Qt6 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt6 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt6 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0
- qtsvg >= 6.0.0
- qttools >= 6.0.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt6ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6ct/releases[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qt6 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt6 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0
- qtsvg >= 6.0.0
- qttools >= 6.0.0 (For build only)

[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt6ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6ct/releases[/url]
[read more]

Qt6 Configuration Tool

[b]Requirements:[/b]

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. item.title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]
item.description:

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]

This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games.
